slide1.title: Good products need more than development alone
slide1.description: From frontend to backend we develop apps and agents that are maintainable and simple in UI.

about.title: A small team that builds digital products properly from the start
about.text1: We focus on websites and systems that do not fall apart as they grow. Instead of rushing into code, we think through structure, interface and long-term maintainability.
about.text2: Our strength is the combination of visual thinking, frontend execution and backend discipline. We care about clean architecture, clarity and products that stay stable over time.
about.text3: Finest agents replace repetitive workflows only with different tools into one connected process. Analyze information, prepare drafts and guide users step by step, helping teams save time without losing control.

craft.title: Design thinking
craft.description: We think beyond visuals — focusing on structure, hierarchy and user flow.

delivery.title: Clean execution
delivery.description: We build interfaces and systems that are readable, structured and easy to maintain.

stack.title: Built to scale
stack.description: We create digital products that grow without turning into technical debt.

services.title: Frontend and backend working together
services.subtitle: We combine structure, interface and visual design to build products that look clear, work fast and stay maintainable.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Responsive and clean interfaces built for real products.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Structured APIs designed for stability and scalability.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: Visual direction, layout and UX focused on clarity.

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.description: Automate repetitive workflows and connect tools into one process.

technologies.title: Built with proven technologies
technologies.description: We use reliable tools that support scalability, clean architecture and long-term maintainability.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.paragraph1: TypeScript helps keep code predictable and easier to maintain as systems grow.
typescript.paragraph2: It allows teams to understand structure and data flow more clearly.
typescript.paragraph3: We use it to build reliable frontend and backend systems.

next.title: Next.js
next.paragraph1: Next.js helps build fast and scalable web applications.
next.paragraph2: It supports modern frontend architecture and server rendering.
next.paragraph3: Great for websites, SaaS products and high-performance interfaces.

react.title: React
react.paragraph1: React allows fast iteration and modular UI.
react.paragraph2: Strong ecosystem for building modern interfaces.
react.paragraph3: Used for SaaS, landing pages and apps.

reactNative.title: React Native
reactNative.paragraph1: Build mobile apps from one codebase.

wordpress.title: WordPress
wordpress.short: Flexible CMS for websites, reports and metrics.
wordpress.paragraph1: WordPress is practical for websites that need easy content management.
wordpress.paragraph2: It works well for company sites, landing pages and editorial platforms.
wordpress.paragraph3: It allows fast publishing and simple admin workflows.

databases.title: Databases
databases.short: Persist data in varieties of forms and structures.

portfolio.title: Examples of what we developed
portfolio.description: Three core areas: frontend, backend and web design.

pdf.aboutGeometry: Geometry Software is a digital product and web development company focused on modern business solutions. We build fast, scalable and user-friendly products using contemporary frontend and backend technologies, with attention to design, performance and future growth.

frontend-react.title: Frontend React
frontend-react.brief: Frontend React app for users, products and shipping.
frontend-react.pdfOverview: We use PDF as a practical digital copy for presenting commercial proposals, project details and business information. It keeps structure, design and content consistent across devices, making documents easy to share, review and store. It supports secure delivery, universal compatibility and stable formatting.
